meta.title: America's NEXT GENERATION of air-launched missiles
meta.description:
Play Conflict of Nations for FREE on PC, iOS or Android:

Receive a Unique Starter Pack, available only for the next 30 days!

-- BREAK -- 

If all goes according to plan, these new weapons will provide the U.S. with the edge it needs to maintain air supremacy throughout the better part of the 21st century, creating yet another inflection point in the timeline of air warfare, and reshaping the way nations fight in the skies around greater ranges, higher speeds, and more onboard computing power than any weapons in history. 

Time may not pick favorites, but Uncle Sam sure does — so let's talk about the latest air-launched weapons making their way toward his war room.
